examples: The court could issue a citation and fine Ms. Robbins.
Studies of citation counts show that international co-authored papers have better visibility.
The first citation for pretzel in English comes in the 1820s in a collection called Antiquities of Long Island.
Cessna is expecting to receive FAA certification for the new Citation X later this year.
Finally, in November 2008, word came that the Presidential Unit Citation had been approved.
